EmailTemplate.name: Claims Auto Response Template
EmailTemplate.subject: Case has been created.
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting the Claims Team.
We have received your email and one of our claims handlers will review it as soon as possible. If your message relates to a new claim, we will acknowledge it and let you know the next steps within 1–2 working days.
For urgent matters, please contact us on ############, Monday to Friday, 9 to 5.
If you have included any documents or claim forms, these will be actioned accordingly and will be added to your file.
Thank you for your patience – we’ll be in touch shortly.
Kind regards
